title: cymbopogon lecomtei
intro: Cymbopogon lecomtei, also known as Lecomte's lemongrass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae that is native to Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Cymbopogon lecomtei include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of Cymbopogon lecomtei include essential oils, teas, and infusions that can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
